original: You cry out as the fire grabs at your "+e.inventory.armor.longName+", catching hold and lapping at it lustily.
“How the hell is that non-lethal?!” you yell at So.

“Pest creatures sometimes encroach on the factory space,” replies the AI, sounding mildly apologetic. “Fire induces a state of extreme submissiveness in them. My algorithms calculate a 71% chance that it will have the same effect on"+(e.isHuman()?"":" genetically modified")+" humans.”
The flames licking at your flesh intensify!
